title: Eke
compiled_truth: Eke is an external contact at [Aelaw](companies/aelaw). Over the corpus period (1999-09-24 to 2001-11-08), Eke sent 16 and received 346 emails, totalling 362 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kmccrea](people/kmccrea-sablaw) (8), [Jdasovic](people/jdasovic) (7), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (6), [Rcavanagh](people/rcavanagh-nrdc) (5), [Wbooth](people/wbooth-booth-law) (5).
